Secret Sniper Agent

You have been given a special mission: to eliminate the men in suits! Secret Sniper Agent is a 2D shooting game in which you are a skilled sniper agent. You have a crucial task on the rooftop. You must hunt down all the men with silenced guns who are moving left and right in the city park.

Play Secret Sniper Agent Online

Loading game...
About Secret Sniper Agent

You have been given a special mission: to eliminate the men in suits! Secret Sniper Agent is a 2D shooting game in which you are a skilled sniper agent. You have a crucial task on the rooftop. You must hunt down all the men with silenced guns who are moving left and right in the city park. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Secret Sniper Agent in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Secret Sniper Agent for free?

Yes. Secret Sniper Agent is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Secret Sniper Agent?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
